description: Style Note You can see the smooth blend of style and comfort in this remanika creation. This printed tunic can be worn with dark leggings and sandals for a contemporary and fashionable look. Product Details Printed tunic with three quarter sleeves, and has a boat neckline Material and Care Polyester Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and tumble dry low Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
